name_cn:
TEEN LULU Logo Print Handbag
Top quality
Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody
This style fits larger smartphones like PLUS
Calfskin
Gold hardware
1 main compartment
Adjustable top handle, 4.72 inches (12 cm) long
Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap, min length 20 inches (51 cm), max length 24 inches (60 cm)
Dimensions: 8.3 X 9.4 X 2 inches (21 X 24 X 5 cm)
Item No.: 120723
